job: Turn one creator capsule into a checked TouchDesigner network handoff: operator list, tox/topology note, twozero MCP safety boundary, generated ignored network spec, and fixed-canvas proof card before any live TouchDesigner session, local port, screenshot, or proprietary .tox export enters the repo.

touchdesigner_adapter.runtime_boundary: TouchDesigner and twozero MCP remain local external operator tools. DASH emits a checked network topology note, safety contract, and fixed-canvas proof card; it does not open ports, connect to a live TD process, commit proprietary .tox/.toe exports, or store screenshots from an account workspace.
operator_contract: noiseField_TOP: synthetic capsule-memory texture only, no imported footage
palette_COMP: DASH token colors mapped into TD constants
pulse_CHOP: deterministic beat clock seeded from capsule remix id
proof_TEXT: visible stamp naming external runtime, no raw media, no private paths
out1_TOP: preview-only output for an operator-owned local workspace

allowed: list local TD connection status after an operator starts it
create nodes from the generated topology note in an operator-owned workspace
export a reviewed public-safe tox only outside git unless separately approved
blocked: auto-opening a local port from this repo check
connecting to an unverified TouchDesigner process
capturing account screenshots or private operator UI
committing .tox, .toe, screenshots, caches, absolute paths, API keys, cookies, tokens, or secrets

nodes.purpose: Generate a synthetic animated field from capsule memory; never import raw footage or reference screenshots.
Hold DASH-derived color constants and make palette remixes explicit.
Drive repeatable motion pulses from a deterministic capsule beat seed.
Stamp the network with external-runtime and public-boundary warnings before any export.
Expose a preview-only output for the local operator to review outside git.

blocked_moves: adding TouchDesigner or twozero as a core dependency from a single adapter win
opening ports or connecting to a live local TD process during CI
committing .tox, .toe, screenshots, caches, raw media, or generated renders
using private prompts, client copy, local absolute paths, provider logs, account screenshots, cookies, tokens, or secrets
skipping browser measure and print proof for the fixed-canvas handoff card

proof: standardized vision QA template + real browser_console DOM verification + generated .artifacts/creator-touchdesigner-tox-qa.md (robust needle alignment per hermes-gsd-evolution)

allowed: public-safe node names and visual grammar
blocked: private prompts or private client copy
raw generated video, raw source media, screenshots, tox/toe exports, and renderer caches
local absolute paths and provider execution logs
API keys, cookies, tokens, secrets, account screenshots, and unverified local ports
unreviewed third-party assets or proprietary fonts

retention: Retain creator-touchdesigner-tox-route as an edge adapter: JSON contract, generated ignored topology/safety artifacts, fixed-canvas proof card, and validation script. Do not promote a package primitive or live twozero execution until a second local operator smoke proves the same boundary without leaking screenshots, ports, private paths, or raw media.
